title: Dynamic Value Box when exporting to PDF.
excerpt: When exporting a doc with dynamic values to a PDF, the box around the text stays. Having the box/es removed when exported would make the PDF version looks cleaner.

posts.author: pcondon-cc (Patrick Condon)
posts.cookedHtml: When exporting a doc with dynamic values to a PDF, the box around the text stays. Having the box/es removed when exported would make the PDF version looks cleaner.
